name: Hot Fudge Sundae Ice Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch pie dish or pan with vanilla wafers.
2. Make the sauce by heating chocolate chips, marshmallows, and evaporated milk together until smooth (microwave is suitable; stir frequently), or use a saucepan. Stir in salt.
3. Scoop about one-third of the ice cream into the wafer-lined dish, drizzle about one-third of the sauce over it. Repeat with another third of the ice cream and sauce. Add the remaining thirds of both.
4. Top with chopped nuts and/or Maraschino cherries if desired.
5. Cover with foil or plastic wrap.
6. Freeze until solid—this takes at least 6 hours, preferably overnight.
7. To serve, remove from the freezer about 20 minutes before serving to soften.
